sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98438" key="summimhth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμμῑμ-ητής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n98438.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">joint imitator,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ep.Phil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
